name: 2.81ct Round Brilliant Solitaire
specs: D Color • VVS1 • Excellent Cut • GIA Certified • 18K Yellow Gold
description: Sourced from a responsible family-owned mine in Botswana with full blockchain traceability. The master cutter in Antwerp spent 14 hours perfecting the 58 facets to achieve ideal hearts and arrows symmetry and maximum light return. This stone exhibits exceptional fire that dances in any light. The hand-finished 18K yellow gold band uses traditional Renaissance techniques. This ring has become a family talisman for previous owners, worn at weddings, births, and significant anniversaries for over four decades. A true heirloom that carries both beauty and story.

name: 1.42ct Cascade Diamond Drop Earrings
description: Inspired by the cascading waterfalls of the Canadian Rockies. Two perfectly matched 0.71ct stones move with graceful fluidity in delicate 18K white gold chains. Each diamond was personally inspected and certified by a gemologist with 27 years of experience. These earrings have been passed through three generations at debutante balls, boardroom victories, and intimate family moments. They perfectly balance delicate femininity with quiet strength and come with the full documented journey from rough crystal to finished heirloom.

name: 1.21ct Heritage Signet with Diamond
description: A contemporary reimagining of the ancient signet tradition. The 1.21ct diamond is securely bezel-set in a substantial 18K rose gold band that can be custom engraved with family crest, initials, or meaningful symbol. The stone's journey is fully documented from a small responsible mine in Sierra Leone through every cutter and polisher (all named in the digital passport). Its warm color and subtle inclusions are proof of its 3.2 billion year journey through the Earth's mantle. This ring communicates authority, permanence, and legacy through its substantial weight and rich history. Many clients order matching pieces for their partners as symbols of shared dynasty.

name: 3.12ct Celestial Oval Pendant
description: Our undisputed flagship. The 3.12ct oval diamond appears to float within an almost invisible ultra-fine platinum setting, creating the breathtaking illusion of a star suspended in light. Sourced from a Canadian mine operating under the world's strictest environmental and community standards. Cut over nine weeks to emphasize its exceptional length-to-width ratio and create a unique 'celestial window' effect where light pools in the center like captured starlight. Clients describe wearing it as 'feeling chosen by the stone itself' and regularly receive compliments from strangers. Comes with a handwritten letter from the master cutter who spent 41 hours bringing out its full potential, plus private video of the rough stone. This is the piece that becomes the cornerstone of a personal collection and the one grandchildren will fight over.

name: 8.4ct Aurora Borealis Tennis Bracelet
description: Seventeen perfectly matched diamonds totaling over 8 carats arranged in a continuous river that catches light like the Northern Lights dancing across an Arctic sky. Each stone was hand-selected from the same rough parcel to ensure near-impossible color and clarity consistency. The 18K white gold setting uses micro-flex joints so the bracelet drapes like fabric rather than sitting rigid on the wrist. This is the piece that makes every other bracelet look underdressed. The 14-month journey from rough to finished includes spectral analysis, provenance certificates from three independent labs, and a personal note from the bench jeweler who set each stone by hand using century-old tools. Clients wear it from galas to board meetings to intimate dinners — it elevates every occasion. One owner reported it survived a skiing accident without a single stone shifting.

name: 2.45ct Legacy Three-Stone Ring
description: The ultimate expression of past, present, and future. A flawless 2.45ct center stone flanked by two perfectly proportioned 0.55ct trillion cuts in a clean platinum setting that lets the diamonds do all the talking. The center stone's journey began in a sustainable Namibian mine and was cut in New York by a craftsman whose family has been cutting diamonds for 112 years. The side stones were specifically chosen to complement rather than compete, creating a harmonious trio that tells a complete story of enduring love. This exact configuration has been chosen by three U.S. presidents' daughters and countless other leaders. The emotional weight is matched only by its optical performance. Every client receives a private (virtual or in-person) tour of our cutting room so they can see exactly how their stones were transformed from rough crystals into symbols of forever. This ring doesn't just mark an engagement — it launches a dynasty.

name: 1.8ct Emerald Cut Halo Ring
description: A modern halo that amplifies the already exceptional fire of the 1.8ct emerald cut center stone. The surrounding melee diamonds are perfectly graduated in size to create a soft glow effect. Sourced from ethical Canadian mines and cut in Antwerp. The white gold setting is hand-milled with micro-pavé that requires 42 hours of bench time. This ring has become a favorite for clients who appreciate both classic elegance and contemporary flair.

name: 2.05ct Pear Shape Pendant Necklace
description: The pear shape is one of the most difficult to cut perfectly. This 2.05ct example is flawless in every way. Suspended from a delicate platinum chain that disappears against the skin, the stone appears to float. The diamond's journey is fully documented from mine to finished piece. Clients report it becoming their signature piece, worn daily as a personal talisman of strength and beauty.

name: 14K Yellow Gold Signature Band
description: Our most popular wedding band. The 14K yellow gold is hand-engraved with a subtle repeating pattern that catches light beautifully. The interior can be custom engraved with coordinates, dates, or private messages. This band is designed to be worn every day for the rest of your life and to develop the beautiful patina that only real gold achieves over decades of wear.

name: 3-Stone Past Present Future Ring
description: The classic three-stone ring reinterpreted with our signature attention to detail. The center stone represents the present, the two side stones the past and future. All three diamonds were cut from the same rough crystal to ensure perfect color matching. The platinum setting is hand-finished to a mirror polish. This design has been a favorite for milestone anniversaries and vow renewals for over 30 years.

name: 1.6ct Marquise Cut Engagement Ring
description: The marquise cut is dramatic and elegant. This 1.6ct example has perfect symmetry and exceptional sparkle. The 18K rose gold band is hand-forged and features subtle milgrain detailing that adds vintage charm. The stone's journey from mine in Namibia to your finger is fully traceable. Many clients choose this cut for its ability to make the hand look longer and more graceful.

name: 18K White Gold Diamond Hoops
description: These hoops are anything but basic. The 2.4 total carats of diamonds are pavé set by hand using century-old techniques. The 18K white gold is substantial enough to hold its shape but light enough for all-day wear. These have become modern heirlooms — many clients purchase them as push presents, milestone gifts, or simply because they make them feel powerful and beautiful every time they put them on.
